beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: GAMBIT — Rest, practice light welling, and prepare for the council meeting
beats.summary: Usnea rests and communes with Millbrook's essence at dawn — but the harvest of concentrated light slips, attention already on the day ahead.

beats.name: Usnea Beard
beats.label: acted
beats.summary: Usnea arrives at Millbrook common house on Thursday morning — all witnesses confirmed, warden sanction granted, Mara ready to open.
